title: Implement metrics collection system in Simulation class
description: Integrate the detailed metrics collection implementation plan into the Simulation class. Add metrics tracking variables, modify start_transmission and get_rx_result methods, and add metrics summary methods as documented in metrics_plan.md.
close_reason: Implemented metrics collection. New sim/metrics.py Metrics class tracks transmissions, deduplicated receptions (per receiver,tx) and collisions (per receiver,overlapping-tx-set), per-delivery latency, and derived delivery_rate/collision_rate. Wired into Simulation (record on start_transmission and in get_rx_result). Dedup is essential because get_rx_result is polled ~1ms. Tests: tests/sim/test_metrics.py (unit + integration with independent oracles).
